reasons: Angela can attach to Hilda during aggressive invade or backline dive timing.
Hilda becomes harder to punish when Angela adds shielding and healing after the commit.

proof.summary: Hilda creates early pressure and dives into danger, while Angela adds healing and shielding to extend that dive.
worksBestWhen: Angela saves Heartguard for Hilda's real commit.
Hilda finds a backline or jungle target.
failureCases: Hilda dives into layered crowd control.
Hilda cannot reach a valuable target.

reasons: Mathilda helps Hilda enter or exit fights more safely.
Hilda can use Mathilda's mobility support to pressure invade paths without being trapped after committing.

proof.summary: Hilda pressures fog-of-war and backline areas, while Mathilda improves her engage and retreat options.
worksBestWhen: Hilda uses Mathilda's mobility to avoid overcommitting.
The team coordinates around early invade timing.
failureCases: Hilda dives beyond Mathilda's support range.
Enemy hard control catches Hilda before she can retreat.

reasons: Rafaela's speed and healing help Hilda rotate, chase, and survive early skirmishes.
Hilda can use Rafaela's movement support to reach squishy targets during invade or collapse timing.

proof.summary: Hilda wants fast map pressure, while Rafaela improves chase and retreat reliability.
worksBestWhen: Rafaela speeds Hilda into invade or collapse timing.
Hilda uses the movement window to reach squishy targets.
failureCases: Hilda fails to create early pressure.

reasons: Selena's traps and arrow pressure create early pickoff paths that Hilda can immediately follow.
Hilda can wait near Selena's vision setup and punish enemies who enter jungle or bush routes.

proof.summary: Selena controls fog-of-war and creates catch windows, while Hilda follows from bush or invade angles.
worksBestWhen: Selena places traps around jungle entrances.
Hilda waits near the trap or arrow path.

reasons: Popol and Kupa can place traps that give Hilda safer invade paths and better information before diving.
Hilda can use trap information to collapse on isolated targets around jungle entrances and bush routes.

proof.summary: Popol and Kupa controls approach paths with traps, while Hilda uses that information to invade, collapse, or dive isolated backline targets.
worksBestWhen: Traps are placed before Hilda invades.
Hilda plays around jungle entrances and bush pressure.
failureCases: Popol and Kupa place traps too late.
The enemy clears or avoids the trapped path.
